description_long: This backpack features a modern, streamlined design with a predominantly light teal body and contrasting light green panels on the front and top. The front panel is angular and slightly protruding, suggesting a structured main compartment, while a smaller, similarly shaped pocket is visible at the lower front. The top of the backpack has a sturdy handle in matching green, and the back is smooth with minimal visible seams. The sides are clean and unadorned, emphasizing the bag's geometric silhouette. The overall appearance is minimalist, with no visible logos, decorative elements, or external attachments.
description: A sleek, light teal and green backpack with a structured, angular front pocket and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular main compartment and a smaller front pocket, both in light green, with a clean, geometric look.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the backpack's depth and smooth, uninterrupted teal surface, with the handle and top panel visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain teal surface with a green handle at the top, lacking visible straps or pockets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the backpack's depth and the clean, teal side panel.
attribute_strap_design: One top handle is visible; no shoulder straps or additional straps are visible from any view.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment and one front pocket, both externally visible; no side or mesh pockets are present.
